title: Tenants
description: The instance's tenant registry. A tenant is a control-plane record, not a provisioned resource.
empty: No tenants yet. Create the first one to get started.
aiModelsLoadError: Could not load this tenant’s AI models.
aiModelsMenuEmpty: This tenant has no AI models available: the {{tierLabel}} tier grants none (or the ones it grants are disabled), and this tenant has no additional grants. Package or re-enable a model on the tier (its AI Models tab), or grant one to this tenant, before assigning a model here.
aiRateDescription: Rate ceiling for AI inference requests. Leave blank to inherit the platform default.
aiRoutingCheckboxLabel: Allow external AI routing for NL→rule authoring
aiRoutingDescription: Consent to send this tenant's rule descriptions to an external AI model for drafting. Off by default; rule drafting stays unavailable for the tenant until this is granted.
aiRoutingOffNotice: External AI routing is off for this tenant (Settings tab). Assignments here are saved, but the tenant cannot draft rules until it is enabled.
effectiveDefaultDisabled: No model assigned. The tier’s default ({{model}}) is disabled, so nothing takes the call — this function is unavailable for the tenant.
effectiveNoDefault: No model assigned and the {{tierLabel}} tier marks no default — this function is unavailable for the tenant. Assign a model above, or set a default on the tier.
effectiveOffMenu: Assigned {{model}}, which is no longer on this tenant’s menu — it resolves to no model until you pick an available one or the model is granted again.
effectiveTierDefault: No model assigned — falls back to the tier default, {{model}}.
inheritDefaultHint: Leave blank to inherit the platform default.
noModelsOnMenu: No models on this tenant’s menu.
outboundRateDescription: Rate ceiling for outbound connector actions. Leave blank to inherit the platform default.
settingsExplanation: What this tenant is metered at, and where each limit comes from. A setting falls back from its own override, to the <tierLink>{{tier}}</tierLink> tier, to the platform default — which is a real limit, never unlimited.
tierDescriptionCreate: The packaging this tenant is held to. Sets its defaults across the platform; individual settings below can still override them.
tierDescriptionEdit: The packaging this tenant is held to. Changing it applies within a minute.
tokenDescription: The tenant id used across the platform; it cannot change.
